title: FERAL: Factored Error-Resistant Algebra Library
description: A pure-Rust sparse symmetric indefinite linear solver with certified inertia counts, built as a clean-room replacement for MUMPS in interior-point optimization workloads. Implements multifrontal LDL^T with Bunch-Kaufman pivoting, exact inertia certification gated against MUMPS 5.8.2 and SPRAL SSIDS oracles, and a C ABI plug-in for Ipopt 3.14.
